response:
```sql
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN p.screen_pass THEN 'Passed' ELSE 'Failed' END AS screen_outcome, 
  COUNT(p.patient_id) AS patient_count 
FROM app.patients p 
JOIN app.sites s ON s.site_id = p.site_id 
WHERE s.name = 'Tokyo' 
  AND p.sponsor_id = :sponsor 
GROUP BY p.screen_pass 
ORDER BY patient_count DESC 
LIMIT 100;
```
